fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer you want to create a finance charge memo for.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city name of the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the finance charge memo.

fields.name: Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact when you communicate with the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's reference. The content will be printed on the related document.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's market type to link business transactions to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the finance charge memo should be issued.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when payment of the amount on the finance charge memo is due.

fields.name: Fin. Charge Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the involved finance charges in case of late payment.

fields.name: Interest Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the interest amounts on the finance charge memo lines.

fields.name: Additional Fee
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the additional fee amounts on the finance charge memo lines.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date used to include entries on VAT reports in a VAT period. This is either the date that the document was created or posted, depending on your setting on the General Ledger Setup page.

fields.name: Company Bank Account Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account to use for bank information when the document is printed.

fields.name: Assigned User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who is responsible for the document.
